name: Rose Angelbeam
projectTitle: Wildfire Smoke Mitigation Decision-Support Tool — Mountain Valley Community, Colorado
description: This tool compares three engineering alternatives for reducing PM₂.₅ exposure in a mountain valley community (e.g., Glenwood Springs / Roaring Fork Valley corridor, CO) during wildfire or prescribed burn events. Users adjust emission rate (Q), wind speed, effective plume height (H), and receptor distance; the tool then computes dispersion outcomes and runs a full MCDA evaluation.
